title: MVPL Common Verification Schema
description: Minimum field set for structured verification. Personal data never reaches the engine.

first_name_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of normalized first name. Raw name is never transmitted.

last_name_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of normalized last name. Raw name is never transmitted.

address_numeric.description: Numeric portion of address only. e.g. '2-8-1' extracted from full address. Prefecture and city are never transmitted.

id_upper4.description: First 4 digits of personal identifier (my number, license number, etc). Full number is never reconstructable from this field alone.

id_lower4.description: Last 4 digits of personal identifier. Combined with id_upper4, full number remains unrecoverable.

request_id.description: Transaction or session anchor. Used for audit trail and protocol routing. Not personal data.

netcafe.description: Net cafe / manga cafe profile. 4-field verification.

hotel.description: Hotel / capsule hotel / guest house profile. 6-field verification.

contract.description: Contract verification profile. Adapts to domain-specific fields.
